sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14365" key="a)po/yhfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόψηφ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">voting in the negative,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀ. ἐγένοντο τοῦ ἀποκτεῖναι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.13B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.13B.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
